title: bupleurum subspinosum
intro: Bupleurum subspinosum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Chinese kochia, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is a traditional Chinese medicine used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum subspinosum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting liver function, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum subspinosum can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, extracts, and tinctures, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
